title: Maximum Storage Allocation for Monday Code Applications
excerpt: I am developing an integration feature and planning to upload my code to the Monday code server. I found the infrastructure specifications (attached screenshot), but I couldn’t find details about the maximum storage allo…

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am developing an integration feature and planning to upload my code to the Monday code server. I found the infrastructure specifications (attached screenshot), but I couldn’t find details about the maximum storage allocation for applications.

Could anyone clarify the storage limit for Monday Code apps?

Thanks!

image740×272 19.2 KB

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Timothy7,

We store in monday storage (6mb limit) or monday secure storage. Larger files would need to be stored externally from monday code!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml: Just to clarify — did you mean 6MB or 6GB?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Timothy7 @rachelatmonday meant the size of the storage for client configurations etc within storage. She did not mean the maximum size of the application code that is deployed to monday-code. I’d expect that to be 100s of MB.

Deploy and see if it fails
